name: Frontier National Corp.
summary: As of March 8th, 2013 Frontier National Corporation went out of business. Frontier National Corporation operates as a holding company for Frontier National Bank, which provides retail and commercial banking services in central Alabama and westcentral Georgia. It provides time deposits, and checking, savings, negotiable order of withdrawal, and money market accounts; offer business, real estate, personal uses, home improvement, and automobiles loans. The bank also provides letters of credit; discount brokerage services, credit cards, and individual retirement accounts; safe deposit box rentals; bank money orders; and electronic funds transfer services, including wire transfer and automated teller machines. In addition, the company, through its other subsidiaries, offers credit life, accident, and health insurance products, as well as acts as an agent for carriers of other types of insurance. The bank operates through the branches located in Childersburg, Vincent, Chelsea, Lanett, Valley, and Auburn in Alabama. Frontier National was organized in 1997 and is based in Sylacauga, Alabama.
